Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Total events:', len\(d\)\); print\('Today sample:'\); today='2026-04-08'; [print\(' ', e['title'], e.get\('impact'\)\) for e in d if e['date'].startswith\(today\)][:5]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); [print\(d['text']\) for d in data[-20:] if 'error' in d.get\('type',''\).lower\(\) or 'Error' in d.get\('text',''\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Status:', d.get\('status'\)\) for item in d.get\('items', []\)[:3]: print\('-', item.get\('title',''\)[:80]\) " curl -s "https://api.rss2json.com/v1/api.json?rss_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.reuters.com%2Frss%2FbusinessNews&count=3")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(d\), 'events'\); print\('last date:', sorted\(set\(e['date'][:10] for e in d\)\)[-1]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(d\), 'next week events'\); dates=sorted\(set\(e['date'][:10] for e in d\)\); print\('dates:', dates[:5]\)")
Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(type\(d\), len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else str\(d\)[:200]\) if isinstance\(d, list\): for e in d[:3]: print\(e\) " echo "---")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); g=d.get\('grouped',{}\); print\('source:', d.get\('source'\), '| days:', len\(g\)\); [print\(' ', k, '-', len\(v\), 'events', '| high:', sum\(1 for e in v if e.get\('imp'\)=='High'\)\) for k,v in sorted\(g.items\(\)\)]")
